chunks.title: Daniel's Vision and the Man in Linen
chunks.reason: Describes the setting, Daniel's mourning, and the appearance of the glorious man to Daniel alone.

chunks.title: The Man Speaks to Daniel
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue where the man explains the vision's meaning and Daniel's physical reaction.

chunks.title: Daniel's Weakness and Restoration
chunks.reason: Depicts Daniel's speechlessness, the man touching his lips, and the strengthening of Daniel.

chunks.title: The Spiritual Battle Revealed
chunks.reason: Explains the conflict with the prince of Persia and Greece and the role of Michael.
